title: Zero In Liquid Ant Nest Killer – 500ml, Fast-Acting, Effective Ant Nest Elimination, Non-Toxic, Safe for Indoor and Outdoor Use, Easy Application (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
FAST-ACTING FORMULA: Quickly targets and eliminates ant nests, providing rapid results and reducing ant populations efficiently
PRECISE: Precision nozzle allows for targeting deep into nests
EASY-TO-USE: Comes with clear instructions for application, making it simple to use and ensuring effective results with minimal effort
NEST ELIMINATION: Directly kills ants at their source, preventing further infestation and reducing the need for ongoing treatments.
PREVENTATIVE: Contains anti-bacterial disinfectant that prevents insects carrying germs into the home
